key_dungeons.name: Rotting Barrow
key_dungeons.description: The air around Rotting Barrow shimmers with faint heat. Strange runes glow along the doorframe.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Descend into Rotting Barrow and find the Iron Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: The passage grows more treacherous with every floor.

game_log: Thelma: Hail new arrivals! I hear you are in need of coin and more to aid in your adventures. I have a problem that I think you can solve. Maybe we can make a deal? I am the shop owner and I've found myself with a Graint Rat problem and I suspect it may be even worse. They are in my shop and in my basement. If you would deal with that problem I can make it worth your while! I have some extra Camping Supplies that I think may be real worthwhile. Deal?
Thelma: Wonderful! I'm counting on you. Good luck out there!
Quest 'Rats!': Kill the shop rat - Complete!
Quest 'Rats!': Kill the basement rats - Complete!
Quest 'Rats!': Rat Out the Goblic - Complete! | All steps done! Return to the quest giver for your reward.
Thelma: Thank you, hero! Here is your reward: +100 XP, +100 Gold, +2 items (Camping Supplies, Arrows)

Neil: Oh my... I was part of a "ghost hunter" team. I never really believe it ghosts at all until I came face to face with one in one of those houses. My partner didn't make it. Can ghosts kill? I'm so sorry I lied about being a ghost hunter. Can you take care of this? I can share my fee with you...
Neil: Wonderful! I'm counting on you. Good luck out there!
Quest 'Ghost Hunters': Debunk the Ghost - Complete! | All steps done! Return to the quest giver for your reward.
Neil: Thank you, hero! Here is your reward: +100 XP, +50 Gold
Lonny: Fear the wild and avoid dark places until you are ready. For we will need you to one day confront the great worm.

Loren : Up to the North is a cave where we suspect the goblins that have been causing all this mischief have been hiding. There is a reward for any adventurer willing to take on this problem for our town.
Loren : [Adventurer's Note: This quest will take you into the Goblin's Nest dungeon — tread carefully.]
Loren : Wonderful! I'm counting on you. Good luck out there!
You descend into Goblin's Nest - Floor 1... No torch equipped!
The party opened a treasure chest and found 6 gold and Sling.
The party opened a treasure chest and found 24 gold and Mace.
The party defeated Wolves and Goblins.
Wolves and Goblins defeated! (2/3) | Quest 'Goblins': Kill the Goblin Leaders - Complete!
Quest 'Goblins': Kill Those Goblins - Complete! | All steps done! Return to the quest giver for your reward.
The party defeated Wolves and Goblins.
The party defeated Wolves and Goblins.
Exit to the surface! Press ESC to leave.
Loren : Thank you, hero! Here is your reward: +100 XP, +100 Gold
Retrieve the Town Seal: Our town's seal has been stolen and hidden in that creepy forest near the sea up north. Please retreive this artifact and I will provide passage off this island.
Retrieve the Town Seal: [Adventurer's Note: This quest will take you into the The Old Forest by the Sea dungeon — tread carefully. A powerful guardian is said to watch over what you seek.]
Retrieve the Town Seal: Wonderful! I'm counting on you. Good luck out there!

Lori: We lost our family heirloom in that old abandoned builiding over there. Can you help us find it?  [ENTER]
